se,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1753883146,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7323141614828801086","book_info":{"abstract":"【收服天下真好汉，拳打北海契丹，脚踢西夏党项，再造大唐盛世】
大学生赵九意外穿越成北宋皇帝赵佶的第九子。
而此时的他，仅仅只有七岁，即没有兵权，也不知道自己将是南宋开国皇帝。
他知道的，只是不久的将来金人南下，二圣北狩。
也不知在不久的将来，这个几乎没有历史知识的大学生赵九，将会和这个江山即倒的时代碰撞出怎样的火花。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7fd81fe46f723aa8127533079e83c3cf~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"排骨煲仔饭","author_id":"","book_id":"7323141614828801086","book_name":"水浒：穿越赵构，镇守北境","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":73,"name":"大唐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=73&name=大唐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7323141654745973310","read_count":"10","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"180180"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"68","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,大唐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7fd81fe46f723aa8127533079e83c3cf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448328&x-signature=jayLivmS4auBLs1%2Bup%2F%2FaASkJuM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109941218246","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.788595e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191208EF1FAB0E8560B2428454"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"2","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2540,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4328,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":63},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_ty
